verdict.summary: Guide contains several material inaccuracies about who owes IUC, late-payment consequences, exemptions, categories and the alleged DUA/IPO/sale blocking.

issues.current: Владелец, зарегистрированный в DUA на 1 января данного года
issues.problem: For ordinary vehicles in IUC categories A–E, the taxable person is generally the registered owner/holder on the date the tax becomes due, i.e. in the vehicle registration anniversary month, not automatically whoever is registered on 1 January. The 1 January logic is not the general rule for cars.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «Платит лицо, на чьё имя автомобиль зарегистрирован в Conservatória/DUA на дату наступления обязанности по IUC — обычно в месяц годовщины португальской регистрации автомобиля. Правило “на 1 января” не является общим правилом для легковых авто.»

issues.current: Срок оплаты — до конца месяца годовщины первой регистрации машины
issues.problem: Potentially misleading for imported used cars: the payment month is tied to the Portuguese registration/matrícula for IUC purposes, while the tax rate may use the first registration date in Portugal/EU/EEA depending on the case. Saying simply “first registration” can make expats with imported cars use the wrong month.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Срок оплаты — до конца месяца годовщины португальской matrícula/регистрации. У импортированных б/у машин дата первой регистрации может влиять на расчёт ставки, но месяц оплаты обычно определяется португальской matrícula.»
issues.source: Código do IUC, art. 4; Portal das Finanças — IUC

issues.current: Если IUC не оплачен — блок DUA. Техосмотр (IPO) не пройдёте, продать машину без оплаты тоже нельзя.
issues.problem: This is materially misleading. Non-payment of IUC is a tax debt handled by Autoridade Tributária and may lead to penalties, interest and tax enforcement/penhora, but IUC proof is not normally a condition for IPO inspection and the debt is personal to the taxpayer, not a simple automatic DUA block that prevents every sale.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «Неоплаченный IUC превращается в налоговый долг: AT начислит coima/проценты и может начать cobrança coerciva/penhora. IPO обычно не проверяет оплату IUC как условие прохождения. При продаже долг остаётся у лица, которое было обязано платить IUC на соответствующую дату.»
issues.source: Código do IUC; Regime Geral das Infrações Tributárias; Portal das Finanças

issues.problem: Category A is not simply “light vehicles under 1100 cc”. Category A covers older light passenger/mixed vehicles registered in Portugal/EU/EEA before the relevant cut-off, with rate bands by fuel, cylinder capacity and voltage where applicable. The title incorrectly narrows the category to <1100 cc.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Категория A — старые легковые/смешанные автомобили, обычно с регистрацией до 1981; ставка зависит от топлива, объёма двигателя/электрического напряжения и года.»

issues.problem: Category B is not only petrol cars. It covers light passenger/mixed/goods vehicles, generally up to 3.5 t, after the statutory cut-off, including petrol, diesel and other fuels. Diesel vehicles may also have additional taxation.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «Категория B — большинство современных легковых/смешанных/лёгких коммерческих авто до 3,5 т, включая бензин, дизель и другие виды топлива; ставка зависит от объёма, CO₂, топлива и года.»

issues.problem: Too simplified and can be wrong. For category B, the formula differs by registration period and includes cylinder capacity, CO₂, fuel type, year coefficient and possible additional diesel components. A 1.4 petrol car can exceed these ranges depending on CO₂/year; a 1.6–2.0 diesel can also be much higher.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Для категории B расчёт зависит не только от объёма: важны дата регистрации, CO₂, топливо, коэффициент года и возможная дизельная надбавка. Диапазоны ниже — только грубая оценка; точную сумму смотрите в Portal das Finanças перед оплатой.»
issues.source: Código do IUC, art. 10 and annual IUC tables

issues.problem: Category C is not “goods up to 12 t”. Category C concerns goods vehicles and certain mixed-use vehicles with gross weight over 2.5 t used for private goods transport; rates are by weight/axles/suspension. Public/authorised goods transport is a separate category D. The 12 t threshold is misleading.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «Категория C — грузовые/смешанные автомобили для частного грузового транспорта свыше 2,5 т; ставка зависит от массы, осей и подвески. Категория D — грузовой транспорт по найму/общественный транспорт грузов.»

issues.current: Substeps list categories A, B, E, C and electric vehicles; category D is omitted.
issues.problem: The guide says rates depend on classes A–E but omits category D entirely, which is a statutory IUC category for certain goods transport vehicles. That makes the category overview incomplete.
issues.suggestion: Add: «Категория D — автомобили для грузового транспорта по найму/за вознаграждение или общественный грузовой транспорт; ставки зависят от массы, осей и подвески.»

issues.current: Освобождены от IUC (только Imposto sobre os Veículos IVA при покупке + номинальная плата).
issues.problem: The phrase is legally confused: ISV and IVA are different taxes; “Imposto sobre os Veículos IVA” is not a tax name. Fully electric vehicles may be exempt from IUC/ISV under specific rules, but VAT is separate and not just a nominal fee. Registration/DUA fees are administrative, not IUC.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Полностью электрические автомобили, как правило, освобождены от IUC. При покупке отдельно могут применяться IVA и административные сборы; ISV и IVA — разные налоги.»
issues.source: Código do IUC; Código do ISV; Código do IVA

issues.problem: The late-payment penalty schedule is not a simple automatic 10% after 30 days. Late/non-payment of IUC is handled under tax offence and tax collection rules: coima, interest and possible enforcement apply, with reductions depending on voluntary payment and procedural stage. The stated percentages are not a reliable legal rule.
issues.suggestion: Replace the 10/20/30% ladder with: «При просрочке AT начисляет coima и проценты; размер зависит от суммы, срока, добровольной оплаты и стадии процесса. После уведомлений долг может перейти в cobrança coerciva.»
issues.source: Regime Geral das Infrações Tributárias; Lei Geral Tributária; Código de Procedimento e de Processo Tributário

issues.problem: Same issue: this percentage ladder is not the statutory way IUC late-payment penalties are calculated.
issues.suggestion: Remove and use the general coima/interest/enforcement wording instead of fixed percentages.

issues.problem: Same issue: this percentage ladder is not the statutory way IUC late-payment penalties are calculated.
issues.suggestion: Remove and use the general coima/interest/enforcement wording instead of fixed percentages.

issues.current: 🚫 Блок DUA — не пройдёте IPO, не продадите машину
issues.problem: This repeats the misleading claim that unpaid IUC automatically blocks DUA, IPO and sale. IUC debt is normally enforced against the taxpayer through AT; IPO and transfer are not generally blocked merely because the seller has not paid IUC.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «Риск — налоговое взыскание AT: coima, проценты, cobrança coerciva и penhora. Проверка IUC не является обычным условием IPO.»
issues.source: Portal das Finanças; Regime Geral das Infrações Tributárias

issues.current: При покупке б/у авто обязательно спросите у продавца IUC-comprovativo (подтверждение) за последние 3 года. Без него вы можете унаследовать долг.
issues.problem: Misleading. The buyer does not normally inherit the seller’s personal IUC tax debt for prior periods. It is sensible to ask for proof and ensure ownership transfer is correctly registered, but the key risk is becoming liable from the relevant registration/tax date after acquisition, not inheriting three years of seller debt.
issues.suggestion: Write: «При покупке б/у авто полезно попросить último comprovativo de IUC и проверить, что переоформление собственности зарегистрировано немедленно. Старые долги IUC обычно остаются за лицом, которое было обязано платить в соответствующий год; покупатель отвечает за IUC после регистрации на своё имя.»

issues.problem: Overstates the exemption. The disability exemption generally requires a certified disability degree of at least 60% and is subject to conditions and a monetary cap; where the IUC exceeds the cap, only part may be exempt. It is not always a full exemption for every vehicle.
issues.suggestion: Write: «♿ Pessoas com deficiência ≥ 60% — освобождение при соблюдении условий и обычно с годовым лимитом освобождения; если IUC выше лимита, разницу нужно платить. Требуется подтверждение/заявление в AT.»

issues.current: 🚗 Первый год для ветеранов и многодетных — скидка
issues.problem: This is likely wrong or at least unsupported. The Código do IUC has specific exemptions for certain entities/uses and persons with disabilities, but a generic “first-year discount for veterans and large families” is not a standard IUC rule. Large-family benefits are more associated with ISV/vehicle acquisition contexts, not a generic first-year IUC discount.
issues.suggestion: Remove unless a precise legal basis is provided. If intending to mention other benefits, specify the exact regime and whether it is ISV, IVA or IUC.

issues.current: 🏝️ Madeira и Açores — пониженные ставки на местные
issues.problem: Too vague. Autonomous Regions can have regional adaptations/reductions, but the guide should not imply a blanket lower IUC for all “locals” without specifying applicable vehicle categories, residence/registration requirements and regional legislation.
issues.suggestion: Write: «В Madeira/Açores могут действовать региональные ставки/адаптации. Проверяйте сумму в Portal das Finanças по конкретной matrícula и региональной регистрации.»
issues.source: Código do IUC; regional tax legislation of Madeira and Açores

issues.problem: This wording can confuse users. Portuguese tax payment is normally made using the payment reference through Multibanco/homebanking, MB Way where available, CTT or AT treasury services; a normal SEPA bank transfer to AT is not the usual method for IUC.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «🏦 Homebanking/Multibanco по entidade + referência + montante»

issues.problem: Oversimplified and not aligned with the actual penalty system. It also contradicts the later 10/20/30% ladder.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «Просрочка — coima, проценты и возможное cobrança coerciva/penhora; размер зависит от стадии и добровольной оплаты.»

issues.problem: The Código do IUC was approved by Lei n.º 22-A/2007, not by a Decreto-Lei. The DRE consolidated-law URL shown as “decreto-lei/2007” is suspicious and may point to the wrong consolidated act or be unstable.
issues.suggestion: Use the official consolidated version for «Lei n.º 22-A/2007 — Código do Imposto Único de Circulação» on dre.pt and label it as Lei, not Decreto-Lei.

missing_topics: Explain that IUC liability is personal to the registered taxable person at the relevant due date; old seller debts are not normally inherited by the buyer.
Clarify imported used cars: Portuguese matrícula/payment month versus first registration date used for rate calculation.
Mention that category B calculation may include fuel type, CO₂, year coefficient and diesel additional components, not just engine size.
Add category D to the category overview.
Add a caveat that exact IUC should be checked in Portal das Finanças because annual tables and vehicle-specific data determine the amount.
Clarify disability exemption conditions and monetary cap instead of calling it always full.
Distinguish IUC from ISV and IVA for electric vehicles.
